sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see the gray frame is at rows 38-43, cols 8-13. The green block is at (38, 8), which is the top-left corner of the frame.
The green block is 2x2, and the frame is 6x6. So the green block can be at 3x3 = 9 positions within the frame:
- Rows: 38, 40, 42
- Cols: 8, 10, 12
Let me systematically try all 36 states (4 toggle states × 9 green block positions). I'll start with Red ON, Blue ON (most promising based on alignment) and try all 9 green positions.
Current state: Red OFF, Blue OFF, green at (38, 8) = top-left.
Let me first set the toggles to Red ON, Blue ON, then try all 9 green positions.

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
